name: performance_profile_aggregate
briefDescription:
Aggregate performance data for a static entity over a 
 time window .

name: performance_profile_hotspots
briefDescription:
Return top N entities by the given metric ( p50 , p90 , 
 p99 , errorRate , u...

name: performance_profile_slow_chains
briefDescription: Find sync chains whose total p90 exceeds the threshold .

name: performance_profile_compare_windows
briefDescription:
Compare performance between two time windows for 
 regression detection .
